postgresql.title: PostgreSQL
postgresql.description: Row-level security on every table. Complete audit trail for compliance. Your data never leaves your infrastructure.

authz.title: AuthZ API
authz.description: OAuth 2.0 + RBAC with envelope encryption. Every request is authenticated and authorized. Secrets encrypted at rest.

nginx.title: Nginx
nginx.description: SSL termination, load balancing, and rate limiting. Your single entry point with enterprise-grade security.

ai-portal.title: AI Portal
ai-portal.description: Manage documents, libraries, and AI agents from a single interface. Deploy and configure services with clicks, not code.

milvus.title: Milvus Vector Database
milvus.description: Search millions of documents by meaning, not just keywords. GPU-accelerated for sub-second responses.

redis.title: Redis
redis.description: In-memory data store for session management, job queues, and real-time caching. Makes everything faster.

minio.title: MinIO
minio.description: Store documents, exports, and artifacts with S3 API compatibility. Your data stays on your infrastructure.

litellm.title: LiteLLM Gateway
litellm.description: OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, Bedrock, local models - all through a unified API with automatic fallbacks.
features: Unified API for all LLM providers
Per-user rate limiting and cost tracking

embedding-api.title: Embedding API
embedding-api.description: Convert documents to semantic vectors for similarity search. Fast, efficient, and runs locally.

ingest-api.title: Ingest API
ingest-api.description: Upload PDFs, Word docs, images, and more. AI-powered extraction with layout preservation.

search-api.title: Search API
search-api.description: Find relevant content by meaning, not just keywords. Contextual results with source attribution.

agent-api.title: Agent API
agent-api.description: Deploy AI agents that can search documents, browse the web, execute code, and complete complex tasks.

mlx-server.title: MLX-LM Server
mlx-server.description: Run large language models directly on your Mac with Apple's MLX framework. Optimized for unified memory.

vllm.title: vLLM Server
vllm.description: High-throughput LLM serving with continuous batching. Run the latest open-source models locally.

data_sovereignty.title: Data Sovereignty
data_sovereignty.description: Your documents, conversations, and embeddings never leave your infrastructure. No third-party APIs required for core operations.

air_gap.title: Air-Gap Capable
air_gap.description: Run completely offline after initial setup. Perfect for secure environments, compliance requirements, or unreliable connectivity.

enterprise_security.title: Enterprise Security
enterprise_security.description: Zero-trust architecture, row-level security, envelope encryption, complete audit trails. Built for compliance from day one.

local_llm.title: Local LLM Inference
local_llm.description: Run state-of-the-art language models on your own hardware. No API costs, no data sharing, complete privacy.

unified_platform.title: Unified Platform
unified_platform.description: Document ingestion, semantic search, and AI agents in a single platform. No integration headaches, everything works together.

ultra.name: Ultra
ultra.description: Mac Studio Ultra maxed, Mac Pro
